name: xmr402.org
description: XMR402 — stateless, anonymous payment protocol for the machine economy. HTTP 402 Payment Required standard powered by Monero.

protocol.name: XMR402
protocol.description: Transport-agnostic payment primitive using Monero TX proofs for stateless, anonymous machine-to-machine payments
flow: Server responds HTTP 402 with payment challenge (address, amount, nonce)
Client sends XMR payment and obtains TX proof
Client retries request with TX proof in headers
